title: Hispanic housing network (Grants Pass)
html: Stub. The Spanish-language tear-off-flyer rental ecosystem in Grants Pass — captured Aug 29 2025 ("Se renta traila", $750+, 1-2 personas, todos servicios incluidos). The informal-network adjacent to but separate from the Grants Pass teen era mainstream rental market.
